name: Default Remote
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 420" width="200" height="420">
  <!-- Remote body -->
  <rect x="10" y="10" width="180" height="400" rx="20" ry="20"
        fill="#2a2a2a" stroke="#444" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- Screen region — id must match layout.json -->
  <rect id="screen" x="25" y="25" width="150" height="120" rx="4" ry="4"
        fill="#111" stroke="#555" stroke-width="1.5" style="cursor:pointer"/>
  <text x="100" y="91" text-anchor="middle" fill="#555" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif">screen</text>

  <!-- Volume Up button — id must match layout.json -->
  <circle id="btn-vol-up" cx="100" cy="200" r="24"
          fill="#3a3a3a" stroke="#666" stroke-width="1.5" style="cursor:pointer"/>
  <text x="100" y="196" text-anchor="middle" fill="#ccc" font-size="18" font-family="sans-serif">+</text>
  <text x="100" y="210" text-anchor="middle" fill="#888" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif">VOL</text>

  <!-- Volume Down button — id must match layout.json -->
  <circle id="btn-vol-down" cx="100" cy="270" r="24"
          fill="#3a3a3a" stroke="#666" stroke-width="1.5" style="cursor:pointer"/>
  <text x="100" y="275" text-anchor="middle" fill="#ccc" font-size="18" font-family="sans-serif">−</text>
  <text x="100" y="285" text-anchor="middle" fill="#888" font-size="8" font-family="sans-serif">VOL</text>

  <!-- Mute button — id must match layout.json -->
  <rect id="btn-mute" x="72" y="330" width="56" height="32" rx="6" ry="6"
        fill="#3a3a3a" stroke="#666" stroke-width="1.5" style="cursor:pointer"/>
  <text x="100" y="351" text-anchor="middle" fill="#ccc" font-size="10" font-family="sans-serif">MUTE</text>
</svg>
